task: Write a Python function that validates if a given string is a valid MongoDB ObjectId format (24 hexadecimal characters)
Create a JSON schema that defines a MongoDB document for a user collection with fields: name (string), email (string), age (integer), and createdAt (date)
Write a regex pattern that matches valid MongoDB collection names (alphanumeric characters, underscores, and dots, but cannot start with a dot or contain null characters)
